```python
class Solution:
    def validArrangement(self, pairs: List[List[int]]) -> List[List[int]]:
        pairs.sort(key=lambda x: x[1])
        return pairs
```
solution: ```python
class Solution:
    def validArrangement(self, pairs: List[List[int]]) -> List[List[int]]:
        pairs.sort(key=lambda x: x[1])
        return pairs
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(N log N)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Sorts the pairs based on the end value, ensuring a valid arrangement by connecting pairs sequentially.
